aria_content_in_landmark.0: All content must reside within an element with a landmark role
aria_content_in_landmark.Fail_1: Content is not within a landmark element

style_color_misuse.0: Combine color and descriptive markup to convey information
style_color_misuse.Potential_1: Verify color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information

style_focus_visible.0: The keyboard focus indicator should be visible when default border or outline is modified by CSS
style_focus_visible.potential_focus_not_visible: Check the keyboard focus indicator is visible when using CSS declaration for 'border' or 'outline'

text_contrast_sufficient.0: The contrast ratio of text with its background must meet WCAG AA requirements
text_contrast_sufficient.potential_graphic_background: Verify the contrast ratio of the text against the lightest and the darkest colors of the background meets the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size {1}px and weight of {2}
text_contrast_sufficient.fail_contrast: Text contrast of {0} with its background is less than the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size {1}px and weight of {2}

text_block_heading.0: Heading text should use a heading element or role
text_block_heading.potential_heading: Confirm this text '{0}' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role

aria_id_unique.0: The ARIA property must reference a non-empty unique id of an existing element that is visible
aria_id_unique.Fail_1: The 'id' "{0}" specified for the ARIA property '{1}' value is not valid

input_label_exists.0: Each form control must have an associated label
input_label_exists.Fail_1: Form control element <{0}> has no associated label

input_label_visible.0: An input element must have an associated visible label
input_label_visible.potential_no_label: The input element does not have an associated visible label
input_label_visible.potential_placeholder_only: The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label

form_submit_button_exists.0: A <form> element should have a submit button or an image button
form_submit_button_exists.Potential_1: Verify the <form> element has a submit button or an image button

aria_form_label_unique.0: Each element with "form" role must have a unique label that describes its purpose
aria_form_label_unique.fail_label_not_unique: Multiple elements with "form" role do not have unique labels

aria_landmark_name_unique.0: Each landmark should have a unique 'aria-labelledby' or 'aria-label' or be nested in a different parent region
aria_landmark_name_unique.fail_label_not_unique: Multiple elements with "{0}" landmarks within the same parent region are not distinguished from one another because they have the same "{1}" label

aria_keyboard_handler_exists.0: Interactive WAI_ARIA UI components must provide keyboard access
aria_keyboard_handler_exists.potential_no_keyboard_access: Verify the <{0}> element with "{1}" role has keyboard access

img_alt_valid.0: Images must have accessible names unless they are decorative or redundant
img_alt_valid.fail_no_alt: The image has neither an accessible name nor is marked as decorative or redundant

text_sensory_misuse.0: Instructions should be meaningful without relying solely on shape, size, or location words
text_sensory_misuse.potential_position: Confirm the word(s) '{0}' of the user instruction is used to indicate a logical rather than visual position

table_headers_related.0: For a complex data table, all <th> and <td> elements must be related via 'header' or 'scope' attributes
table_headers_related.Fail_1: Complex table does not have headers for each cell properly defined with 'header' or 'scope'

element_tabbable_role_valid.0: A tabbable element must have a valid widget role
element_tabbable_role_valid.fail_invalid_role: The tabbable element's role '{0}' is not a widget role
